name: sediment
description: Sediment — a persistent community archaeology game for Reddit.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n WEB,API -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/ui && npm run build -w packages/game && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w server
scripts.test: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/ui && npm run build -w packages/game && npm run test -w packages/game --if-present && npm run test -w server --if-present && npm run test -w apps/web --if-present
